title: BALATRO
description:
My Take on Balatro in Minecraft!
There are many "Jokers" you can use and try to put up a new highscore.
Get new Items from the Shop after each Round.
body:
## 📖 **Description**

This is my take on the Game Balatro in Minecraft.


You can move the Datapack into any world but might lose items you place on the Game Board.
You also can play it on qnoss.org

The Goal is to reach each Round Requirement. You lose if you have no Items left. The Round Requirement multiplies after each Round. Scoring Items will be removed.

Yo can get Items in the Shop after each Round.

To Start the Game, place a Armor Stand on a Target Block.
To Remove and Reset Game, destroy the Target Block.


![Gameboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324c7df6e556ed607b1f6db4d37c0c4670d82270.png)


**Multipliers**(Jokers):

Legendary:

-Creeper Spawn Egg: Destroys Multipliers next to it and adds 10 multi per destroyed Multiplier.

-Bat Spawn Egg: Upgrades random Resource Item in Inventory.

-Allay Spawn Egg: Adds Score for each Diamond in Inventory Slots.

-Axolotl Spawn Egg: Upgrades with every use.

-Frog Spawn Egg: Adds 7 multi for each Frog.

-Pig Spawn Egg: Upgrades with Raw Gold.

-Wandering Trader Spawn Egg: Adds 12 multi per Emerald in Inventory.


Epic:

-Golden Apple: Adds Currency as multi.

-Golden Carrot: Adds 1$ per scored Gold Item.

-Knowledge Book: Adds amount of won games to score.

-Eye of Ender: Adds amount of shop rerolls to score.

-Experience Bottle: Adds Players XP Level as multi.

-Clock: Adds amount of Rounds played in run as multi.


Rare:

-Skull Pottery Sherd: Adds multi per unused Multiplier Slot.

-Snort Pottery Sherd: Adds multi per used Inventory Slot.

-Heartbreak Pottery Sherd: Adds 9 multi but breaks when used.

-Prize Pottery Sherd: Adds multi per Diamond scored.

-Blade Pottery Sherd: Adds multi per Gold Ingot scored.

-Miner Pottery Sherd: Adds multi per Raw Gold scored.

-Explorer Pottery Sherd: Adds multi per Gold Nugget scored.


Common:

-Sugar: x2 multi

-Gunpowder: x3 multi

-Glowstone Dust: x4 multi



**Spells**(Tarot Cards):

Rare:

-Skull Banner Pattern: Convert left Item into right Item.

-Flower Banner Pattern: Upgrade Resource Item.

-Globe Banner Pattern: Double Money (Max. 20$).

-Field Banner Pattern: Create 5 random Resource Items.

-Creeper Banner Pattern: Create random Multiplier.

-Bordure Banner Pattern: 50/50 Chance to transform Item.



**Resource Items**(Playing Cards):

-Nether Star: 1000 Value

-Netherite Ingot: 100 Value

-Resin Clump: 30 Value

-Amethyst Shard: 25 Value

-Diamond: 20 Value

-Emerald: 12 Value

-Copper Ingot: 10 Value

-Raw Gold: 3 Value

-Lapis Lazuli: 2 Value

-Gold Nugget: 1 Value



**Seals**:

-Red Seal: Retrigger Scoring

-Glass Seal: x4, 50% Chance to break

-Iron Seal: x2

-Blue Seal: Upgrade random Multiplier Slot

-Gold Seal: Give 2$ when Scored

-Purple Seal: Give random Card






~~~~

![Shop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333bb422a508d3d50e7b8019151065c65e3f480e.png)
